entity.label: Seirah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Woody district; shaggy, a place among the mountains of Ephraim, bordering on Benjamin, to which Ehud fled after he had assassinated Eglon at Jericho (Judg. 3:26, 27).

nodes.label: Seirah
nodes.description: Woody district; shaggy, a place among the mountains of Ephraim, bordering on Benjamin, to which Ehud fled after he had assassinated Eglon at Jericho (Judg. 3:26, 27).

verses.text: And Ehud escaped while they tarried, and passed beyond the quarries, and escaped unto Seirath.
